zh.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓
zh.Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Britis: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: Matthew Irons於1615年出生在英國英格蘭艾可洛維爾。他於大約1636年與Hannah Anne Browne在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1661年1月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Matthew Irons于1615年出生在英国英格兰艾可洛維爾。他于大约1636年与Hannah Anne Browne在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1661年1月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Irons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Iron , with post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Hirons .
Scottish (Angus): habitational name from an unidentified place called Irnys in 1398–9.

variants.name: Iron
meanings: Native American: translation into English (and shortening) of a personal name based on a word, such as Lakota and Dakota Sioux maza, meaning ‘metal’. Among the Sioux, many of their traditional personal names with this element were adopted as surnames (translated into English), e.g. Iron Cloud (see Ironcloud ) and Iron Hawk (see Ironhawk ).
English: nickname perhaps from Middle English iron, the name of a bird, possibly a variant of Middle English ern ‘eagle’ (Old English earn) or of Middle English heroun ‘heron’ (Old French heirun).

nameMeanings.name: Matthew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the Christian evangelist, author of the first gospel in the New Testament. His name is a form of the Hebrew name Mattathia, meaning ‘gift of God’, which is fairly common in the Old Testament, being rendered in the Authorized Version in a number of different forms: Mattan(i)ah, Mattatha(h), Mattithiah, Mattathias, and so on. In the Authorized Version, the evangelist is regularly referred to as Matthew, while the apostle chosen to replace Judas Iscariot is distinguished as Matthias . A related name from the same Hebrew roots, but reversed, is Jonathan . Throughout the English-speaking world Matthew has been particularly popular since the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: Matthew Irons was born in 1615, in Roxwell, Essex, England, United Kingdom. He married Hannah Anne Browne about 1636, in Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 30 January 1661, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Matthew Irons est né en 1615, à Roxwell, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Hannah Anne Browne environ 1636, à Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 30 janvier 1661, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 46 ans.

ja.Roxwell, Essex, England: イギリスイギリスエセックスロクスウエル
ja.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストン
ja.Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Britis: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーボストン
ja.lifeSummary: Matthew Ironsは1615年にイギリスイギリスエセックスロクスウエルで生まれた。約1636年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーボストンでHannah Anne Browneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1661年1月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンで46歳で死去した。

ko.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴
ko.Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Matthew Irons(은)는 1615년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 록스웰에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1636년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴에서 Hannah Anne Browne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1661년 1월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Hannah Anne Browne aproximadamente 1636, em Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Matthew Irons родился в 1615 г. в местности роксвелл, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Anne Browne около 1636 г. в местности бостон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 30 января 1661 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 46 лет.
